Intraday post (29/April)

Here is the big summary post about all these events that most of you is lost in, and the expectations. Always zoom out btw. Read it!And yesterday post with my initial bias for the coming events. Very high probability, but not 100%; use it only to give you some idea.

Coding today’s positioning:

This is a flat-to-negative speed environment, with centroid of 5514.63To the downside 5485.78 is the pivot (but check vol impact at 5498.30 already)And to the upside 5560.08 is needed to get taken out. 5450 is big gamma. If that breaks (high vol is needed), check for mean reversion thresholds.

(Description is here)
